header.title: Settings
header.description: Manage your account details and sign-in credentials.

layout.businessDescription: Manage your account details and sign-in credentials.
layout.billingDescription: Review your plan, monthly minimum, metered usage, and recent charges.
layout.integrationsDescription: Connect your favorite tools and applications.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your monthly minimum, metered usage, and billing access.
billing.checkoutSuccess: Checkout completed. Billing will refresh after Polar confirms the subscription.

plan.title: Plan
plan.freeDescription: Includes 30 voice minutes and 60 SMS segments each month.
plan.paidDescription: Includes a $5 monthly minimum, then bills only for phone minutes and SMS segments used.
plan.minimumChargeDescription: The minimum charge applied before metered voice and SMS usage.
plan.usageModelDescription: Paid workspaces are billed only for actual usage after the monthly minimum.
plan.usageModelValue: Per phone minute and per SMS segment
plan.billingContactDescription: Polar checkout and invoices follow this workspace billing contact.
plan.notApplicable: Not applicable on the free plan

usage.title: Current month usage
usage.meteredUsage: Metered usage with no included cap on the paid plan.
usage.limitReached: The free workspace limit has been reached.

transactions.title: Recent charges
transactions.description: Invoices, payments, and refunds synced from Polar.

errors.portalFailed: Unable to open the customer portal.

appearance.title: Preferences
appearance.description: Set your dashboard language, time format, and theme.

language.label: Dashboard language
language.description: Choose the language used in the dashboard. This doesn't affect the AI.

theme.label: Theme
theme.lightDescription: Bright surfaces with soft contrast for daytime work.
theme.darkDescription: Dimmed surfaces that keep late sessions easier on the eyes.

google.sheetDescription: Connect a Google Calendar and choose which calendar receives bookings.
google.connectionSectionDescription: Connect or reconnect the Google account that should receive bookings.
google.calendarSectionDescription: Choose the calendar to sync and review the latest sync state.
google.chooseStaffFirst: Choose the team member whose Google Calendar you want to connect.
google.disconnectConfirmDescription: This will remove the current Google Calendar connection for bookings.
google.connectFailed: Unable to complete the Google Calendar connection.
google.chooseCalendarFirst: Choose a Google calendar before saving.
google.calendarSaveFailed: Unable to save the selected Google calendar.
google.mappedConnectionsDescription: Each Google connection belongs to one bookable team member.
google.noConnections: No Google Calendar connections exist yet.
google.notConnectedForStaff: This team member does not have a connected Google Calendar yet.
google.notConnectedDescription: Connect Google Calendar to start syncing bookings.
google.noStaff: Add a bookable team member before connecting Google Calendar.

google.title: Google Calendar
google.description: Sync bookings with a Google Calendar.

summary.title: Calendar sync summary
summary.description: A quick view of how the integration layer is performing.

profile.title: Receptionist Profile
profile.description: Define the voice, tone, booking policy, and transfer rules that shape your receptionist.

businessName.label: Business name
businessName.description: This is the name shown across the dashboard and customer-facing business details.

changeEmail.label: Change email
changeEmail.description: Email address you use to log in.
changeEmail.title: Email
changeEmail.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.

errors.alreadyExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.noEmail: No email is configured for this account yet.
errors.missingSiteUrl: Email confirmation isn't configured yet. Set SITE_URL on the Convex deployment and try again.
errors.failed: We couldn't send a confirmation link. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.label: Change password
changePassword.description: Password you use to log in.
changePassword.dialogDescription: Enter your current password and a new password.

hours.title: Opening Hours
hours.description: Structured hours stay authoritative over documents and help the receptionist answer availability questions reliably.
hours.leaveBlank: Leave a day blank to mark it closed.

services.title: Services
services.description: Service definitions power both booking logic and the receptionist snapshot callers hear.

phoneRouting.title: Phone Number Routing
phoneRouting.description: Map Twilio numbers to this business so live calls and SMS load the correct receptionist snapshot.
phoneRouting.saveFailed: Failed to save phone number routing.
phoneRouting.noSid: No Twilio Phone SID saved yet.
phoneRouting.empty: No Twilio numbers are mapped yet. Add the live number you configured in Twilio using exact E.164 format.

team.title: Bookable Team
team.description: Booking only works for services that have at least one active team member assigned.
team.name: Name
team.assignmentDescription: Choose which services each team member can book over phone or SMS.
team.emptyStaff: Add at least one team member before assigning services.
team.emptyServices: Add services first, then come back here to make them bookable.

snapshot.title: Receptionist Snapshot
snapshot.description: The voice gateway pulls this business context once when a live call begins.
snapshot.emptyDigest: No generated digest yet. Add knowledge or documents to enrich the receptionist.

nextSteps.title: What to do next
nextSteps.description: Tighten the live receptionist behavior before you route real traffic.
nextSteps.hours: Set hours, services, and bookable team assignments so booking can suggest real times.
nextSteps.transfer: Add transfer rules and a fallback number before handing off urgent calls.
nextSteps.snapshot: Refresh your snapshot after major policy changes so voice picks them up quickly.
